bannerText: All your Requests AVAILABLE NOW ⭐ ORDER TODAY - LIMITED QUANTITIES AVAILABLE
qualityDesc: We source only the finest products to ensure top-tier quality for our customers.
freshDesc: Our products are delivered fresh daily, maintaining optimal taste and nutrition.
naturalDesc: All our items are organic and free from harmful chemicals and preservatives.
emptyCartDesc: Looks like you have not added anything yet.
collectionsDesc: Discover our latest collection of premium dairy products. Carefully curated items that combine quality, freshness, and authentic Damietta taste.
topPicksDesc: Our most loved products — chosen by our customers.
newsletterDesc: Subscribe to our newsletter to receive exclusive offers, the latest products, and delicious recipes using our natural products.
fromFarmToTableTitle: From the Farm to Your Table.. With Love
farmDesc: At Laban Al-Labban, we never use any chemical additives. We milk from our farms in Damietta every morning and process it using the latest technology while preserving traditional methods that make the taste unforgettable.
heroTitle: The Authenticity of Milk: A Journey from the Farm to Your Table
heroDesc: In Rawda, nature and flavor meet. We never compromise on quality — milked fresh every morning and processed without any chemical additives.
storyTitle: The Story of a Place: Al-Rawda, Damietta
rawdaDesc: The Al-Rawda region of Damietta is famous for its rich soil, abundant water, and ideal climate — the perfect environment for raising the healthiest cows and producing the finest milk.
rawdaBadge: Ideal environment for the finest milk production
qualityDesc2: Every drop is subject to strict quality control — from the farm to your fridge, maintaining the cold chain and delivering same-day.
fromFarmToTable: From Farm to Table in Hours
step1Desc: We begin before dawn so the milk reaches you fresh the same morning.
step2Desc: Modern equipment meets Damietta tradition to preserve authentic flavor.
step3Desc: Fully sealed packaging that preserves freshness with zero chemicals.
authenticDesc: The original ghee cheese served in Egyptian homes for generations.
transparencyDesc: Our farms are open — know exactly where your food comes from.
trustedDesc: Decades of trust built in Damietta and beyond.
formDesc: Have a question or feedback? Fill out the form and we will get back to you right away on WhatsApp.
locationDesc: Visit our primary dairy farm and production center in the heart of Damietta.
tasteDesc: Thousands of families have discovered the real taste of Damietta dairy. Fresh, natural, and delivered to your door.
contactHeaderDesc: We're here to serve you. Share your inquiries or visit our farm in Al-Rawda to experience fresh Al-Labban dairy products directly from the source.
wedLoveToHear: We'd love to hear your feedback and suggestions.
